issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Multi-speaker podcast generation with VibeVoiceTTS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for gTTS/Bark/ElevenLabs and concatenates per-speaker clips; treatment uses VibeVoiceTTS.from_pretrained with synthesize_conversation on a speaker/text list, matching the documented API.

scenarios.name: Medical transcription with diarization and hotwords
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to Whisper + pyannote and approximates hotwords via initial_prompt; treatment calls VibeVoiceASR.transcribe with diarize=True, timestamps=True and hotwords kwarg, iterating result.segments as documented.
